seoTitle: Weetah vs Wellington Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Weetah and Wellington Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Weetah vs Wellington Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Weetah and Wellington Park.
heading: Weetah vs Wellington Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Weetah, Tasmania and Wellington Park, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wellington Park has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Weetah (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Weetah or Wellington Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Weetah has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Wellington Park scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Weetah scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Wellington Park scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Weetah or Wellington Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wellington Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
